name: Cline
description: Installs the Cline VS Code extension and persists its VS Code globalStorage state.

install.description: Kept for consistency. The VS Code extension is added through VS Code customizations.

persist.description: Persist configuration/auth/state by linking the tool's expected directory to the host home directory.

persistMode.description: all persists both customizations (Rules, Skills, Workflows) and extension state (settings, history, auth). configs persists only customization files. state persists only extension state.
